stemHtml: On IFR approach to Aberdeen as BIGJET 123, you request descent twice with no response. ATC calls: "BIGJET 123, NOTHING HEARD, IF YOU HEAR THIS MESSAGE SQUAWK IDENT". What do you do?

options.a: Enter a hold and await further instructions.
options.b: Squawk the correct code and request vectors.
options.c: Squawk ident and repeat your message twice.
